channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris makes pitch to Latino voters at Univision town hall: Top 5 moments
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris faced Latino voters at a Univision town hall, where she was grilled with questions on the economy, immigration and her plans for the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available. CEO Elon Musk said the “Cybercab” doesn’t have steering wheels or pedals.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Five takeaways from the Maryland Senate debate
item.description: Former Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan (R) and Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks (D) sparred in their lone debate this cycle Thursday night as they look to replace retiring Sen. Ben Cardin (D-Md.) next year.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Milton's gone, but the political storm keeps raging over federal government's hurricane efforts
item.description: There's no let up in the war of words between President Biden and former President Trump over the government's response to dangerous hurricanes that slammed into the southeast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dems launched onslaught of schemes slammed as tactics to undermine democracy ahead of high-stakes election
item.description: Democrats have launched an onslaught of political and legal tactics ahead of the 2024 election that have been slammed as attempts to undermine democracy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Back-to-back hurricanes reshape 2024 campaign’s final stretch
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A pair of unwelcome and destructive guests named Helene and Milton have stormed their way into this year's presidential election.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The drownings of 2 Navy SEALs were preventable, military investigation finds
item.description: A military investigation has concluded that two U.S. Navy SEALs drowned as they tried to climb aboard a ship carrying illicit Iranian-made weapons to Yemen because of glaring training failures and a lack of understanding about what to do after a fall into deep, turbulent waters.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris viewed more positively by Hispanic women than by Hispanic men: AP-NORC poll
item.description: A solid majority of Hispanic women have a positive opinion of Vice President Kamala Harris and a negative view of former President Donald Trump, but Hispanic men are divided on both candidates, according to a recent AP-NORC poll.
item.dc:creator: Fernanda Figueroa And Linley Sanders, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US House control teeters on the unlikely battleground of heavily Democratic California
item.description: California's reputation as a politically liberal state is being tested in a string of U.S. House districts that are expected to play into control of the chamber.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Blood, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Obama urges Black men to show up for Harris as he campaigns in critical Pennsylvania
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Former President Barack Obama gave a blistering critique of his White House successor Donald Trump and urged Black men to show up for Kamala Harris as he campaigned in Pittsburgh on Thursday at the start of a swing-state tour for the Democratic ticket.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Obama, stumping for Harris in key battleground, charges Trump 'will makes problems worse'
item.description: On the campaign trail for the first time for Vice President Kamala Harris, Barack Obama repeatedly slammed former President Trump in arguably the most crucial battleground state in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: An inside look at Kern County election operations
item.description: With the general election weeks away 17 News is taking you behind the scenes to see how the Kern County Elections Division is preparing.
item.dc:creator: Cecilia Treviño, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alsobrooks backs court-packing as Hogan fights GOP, McConnell, Trump associations
item.description: Larry Hogan and Angela Alsobrooks faced off during a debate less than one month before the Senate election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's complaints about '60 Minutes' put a spotlight on editing at the nation's top newsmagazine
item.description: Donald Trump skipped a “60 Minutes” interview this past week, but he's attacking CBS for how it handled its session with opponent Kamala Harris, calling it a “giant fake news scam” and suggesting the network was out to protect her.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah candidates for Mitt Romney's open US Senate seat debate approaches to climate change
item.description: The Republican and Democratic candidates vying for Mitt Romney’s open U.S. Senate seat are aiming to convince Utah voters that they have the better blueprint to tackle climate change and protect the state’s vast natural resources.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News Politics: Harris and the Hurricanes
item.description: The latest updates from the 2024 campaign trail, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump insults Detroit while campaigning in the city
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Former President Donald Trump criticized Detroit while delivering remarks to an economic group there on Thursday, saying the whole country would end up like the city if his Democratic opponent, Vice President Kamala Harris, is elected.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI and ISABELLA VOLMERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: Coming up Friday at noon, MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Follow the Money: Understanding FEMA's disaster budget in Hurricane Milton aftermath
item.description: In the event of natural disasters, it can be hard to understand the money, including whether or not FEMA has sufficient funding to respond and if Congress will approve additional relief.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Political storm: On Trump 'onslaught of lies,' Biden urges former president to 'get a life man'
item.description: There's no let up in the war of words between President Biden and former President Trump over the federal government's response to back-to-back dangerous hurricanes that slammed into the southeast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon could resign: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Less than a month after the NYPD's interim commissioner was appointed, another major shake-up could be coming. Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to step down, sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, NewsNation

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: “We have a heart problem in this country and a mental health problem in this country. We don’t have a gun problem in this country,” Esposito said.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, NewsNation

item.title: Mayorkas doubles down, hammers 'pernicious' misinformation amid FEMA criticism
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas is furiously pushing back against what he says is "pernicious" misinformation, sometimes spread deliberately, as the agency attempts to deliver relief.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Voters in key battleground states give Trump an edge over Harris on this top tier issue: poll
item.description: Former President Trump holds a comfortable lead over Vice President Kamala Harris on the issue of immigration, according to a new poll released this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump leads Harris by 4 points in Florida: Survey
item.description: Former President Trump is leading Vice President Harris by a narrow 4 points in Florida, according to a new survey of likely voters in the state.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's small-dollar donor fundraising is beset by confusion and fatigue
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump’s contributions from small-dollar donors have plummeted since his last bid for the White House, presenting the former president with a financial challenge as he attempts to keep pace with Democrats' fundraising machine.
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA, AARON KESSLER and RICHARD LARDNER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: VP Harris ripped by victim of illegal immigrant released under her program over resurfaced speech
item.description: VP Kamala Harris, as California DA, said in a speech that an illegal immigrant let out of jail as part of a program she launched and then assaulting a woman was a "glitch.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Business groups push back after Walz says they supported paid leave program
item.description: While some small business owners advocated for a government-managed leave proposal, the state’s largest business groups sought to block the proposal in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Your guide to voting in Minnesota: Registration, absentee ballots and general election details
item.description: We are less than a month out from Election Day. Here are answers to some frequently asked questions MPR News readers asked us about the upcoming election.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst and Nicole Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Johnson sidesteps question on whether Trump lost 2020 election: ‘This is a gotcha game’
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Sunday sidestepped a question about whether former President Trump lost the 2020 presidential election, calling it a “gotcha game” that he would not play.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: Florida voters concerned about election disruptions after Hurricane Helene
item.description: Polling sites along the coast have lost locations due to Hurricane Helene's damage, and Florida voters are starting to worry about how this could change things for the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump returns to site of attempted assassination, honors shooting victims
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is returning Saturday to the site of his attempted assassination with a rally in Butler County.
item.dc:creator: Patty Coller, Fox 5
